quick_skim.title: SurroundNEXO: Ego-Centric Metric Bridging for Spatially Consistent Geometry in Autonomous Driving
quick_skim.abstract: Modern autonomous driving depends on accurate metric 3D understanding for perception, reconstruction, and planning, which in turn requires reliable multi-camera depth prediction. However, the outward-facing nature of vehicle-mounted surround-view camera rigs inherently limits visual overlap across views, challenging the correspondence-based assumptions that underpin conventional multi-view geometry. To bridge this gap, we present SurroundNEXO, named after the Spanish word nexo for a geometric link, a low-overlap multi-camera metric depth framework that grounds cross-view reasoning in ego-centric geometry rather than dense visual correspondences. Instead of directly enforcing early global fusion, SurroundNEXO first assigns image tokens globally comparable ego-frame viewing directions through Ego-Ray Positional Encoding, then uses sparse LiDAR measurements as metric anchors to propagate absolute scale cues, and finally expands feature interaction progressively from view-local modeling to decomposed spatio-temporal reasoning and global integration. This design enables metric-scale depth prediction with improved spatial consistency across weakly overlapping cameras. Across low-overlap autonomous driving benchmarks, including NuScenes, Waymo and DDAD, SurroundNEXO reduces single-view error by 33.2%, improves cross-view consistency by 10.5%, and enhances metric reconstruction quality by 25.6% compared with SOTA methods. It further remains robust under extremely sparse depth prompts and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to unseen camera layouts.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multi-camera metric depth for autonomous driving, enabling geometry for 3D detection
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向自动驾驶的多相机度量深度，为3D检测提供几何基础
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向自动驾驶的多相机度量深度，为3D检测提供几何基础
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向自动驾驶的多相机度量深度，为3D检测提供几何基础
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SurroundNEXO proposes a low-overlap multi-camera metric depth framework using ego-centric geometry to enable consistent 3D understanding for autonomous driving, applicable to camera-only 3D detection.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现代自动驾驶依赖准确的度量3D理解，但车载环视相机视野重叠有限，导致传统多视图几何方法失效。SurroundNEXO提出了一种基于自我中心几何的低重叠多相机度量深度框架，通过将跨视图推理建立在自我中心几何而非密集视觉对应上，实现了空间一致的度量深度预测。该方法无需LiDAR，可为纯视觉3D目标检测提供可靠的深度线索，适用于自动驾驶感知任务。在多个数据集上验证了其有效性，为多视角纯视觉3D检测提供了关键支撑。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现代自动驾驶依赖准确的度量3D理解，但车载环视相机视野重叠有限，导致传统多视图几何方法失效。SurroundNEXO提出了一种基于自我中心几何的低重叠多相机度量深度框架，通过将跨视图推理建立在自我中心几何而非密集视觉对应上，实现了空间一致的度量深度预测。该方法无需LiDAR，可为纯视觉3D目标检测提供可靠的深度线索，适用于自动驾驶感知任务。在多个数据集上验证了其有效性，为多视角纯视觉3D检测提供了关键支撑。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 使用nuScenes数据集的多视角纯视觉3D目标检测相关论文, especially work that connects or combines: nuScenes dataset for autonomous driving; 3D object detection methods; nuScenes multi-view camera-only 3D detection; 3D object detection on nuScenes dataset; pure visual 3D detection without LiDAR; research papers on 3D object detection using the nuScenes dataset; nuScenes multi view camera only 3D object detection papers; multi view 3D object detection on nuScenes dataset; pure visual 3D detection using nuScenes.
